data.name: Deadrock Redemption 2
data.detailed_description:
Saddle up for sin, survival, and redemption in the wildest frontier the West has ever seen.

ABOUT THIS GAME

The frontier of Deadrock County is a place where justice rides on the edge of a gun barrel and temptation hides behind every saloon door. In Deadrock Redemption 2, you step into the boots of Colt Dawson, a weary gunslinger searching for a second chance in a land that’s forgotten the meaning of mercy.

This open-world 3D Western RPG invites you to roam a living, breathing frontier—where every dusty trail leads to adventure, danger, and desire.

KEY FEATURES

🔥 Thrilling Gunfights
Engage in fast-paced, skill-based duels and large-scale shootouts using authentic Western firearms. Every bullet counts when lawlessness rules the land.

🌵 Expansive Open World
Explore rugged canyons, outlaw hideouts, ghost towns, and frontier settlements across a vast 3D environment powered by modern Unity technology. Every location holds secrets, quests, and choices that shape your legacy.

💃 Meet the Women of the West
Forge relationships—or rivalries—with a cast of beautiful, strong-willed women who define the heart of the frontier. From saloon owners and ranchers to mysterious travelers, each character offers romance, loyalty, or betrayal… depending on how you play.

⚔️ Western-Themed Quests & Morality
Ride across the badlands, defend settlers, hunt bandits, or join them. Your decisions write your legend—hero, outlaw, or something in between.

🏜️ Dynamic Reputation & Faction System
Every action has consequence. Earn fame, infamy, or redemption as townsfolk react to your deeds and alliances.

🎵 Atmospheric Soundtrack & Voice Acting
Immerse yourself in a fully voice-acted narrative featuring an original Western score that captures both the grit and romance of the frontier.

The West is calling, gunslinger.
Will you earn redemption… or become a legend drenched in blood?

In DR2, you step into the boots of Colt Dawson, a weary gunslinger searching for a second chance in a land that’s forgotten the meaning of mercy.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.0.4 or Higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater, Intel Only
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.7.5 or Higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater, Intel Only
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
